recommendations.title: Multi-responsibility functions reduce single-purpose clarity
recommendations.description: Some exported functions handle multiple concerns (I/O, locking, logging, and formatting) within a single long function body. While logically correct, this increases maintenance overhead and makes testing granular behaviors slightly harder.

recommendations.title: Some public-facing types lack brief documentation comments
recommendations.description: Core public types used by CLI-facing APIs are self-explanatory by naming, but explicit doc comments would make the library easier to consume and improve IDE experience.

recommendations.title: Synchronous busy-wait locking is a deliberate but potentially expensive pattern
recommendations.description: The file-locking mechanism uses a synchronous busy-wait loop with exponential backoff. The comments justify this choice for the synchronous hook context, but it does spin the CPU while waiting for a lock.

recommendations.title: Minor opportunity to centralize CLI output responsibilities
recommendations.description: Most complex text formatting is correctly delegated to display/formatters.ts, but a few CLI commands still embed multi-line console.log templates directly.
